title: croton dracena
intro: Croton dracena, also known as Coleus dracunculoides, is a tropical plant native to India and Southeast Asia, commonly used in Ayurvedic medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Croton dracena include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
